meta.reasoning: K7 suited (hearts) is a playable hand. Raising 3x BB from UTG to apply pressure and play with initiative. K7s has good potential for flush draws and top pair scenarios.
4c 2h is the worst starting hand in hold'em. Facing a 3x raise from s4 (early position), calling 60 chips with this hand has deeply negative EV. Even in position (button), this is an easy fold.
J6o from small blind against a 3x raise. Weak offsuit hand with bad position for all future streets. Pot odds insufficient for the hand equity. Standard fold.

meta.reasoning_summary: 4s-5s suited connector in the BB. Getting ~3.25:1 pot odds heads-up against s4's 3x raise. Equity of suited connectors (~38-40%) exceeds the ~31% needed to call profitably. Implied odds for flushes and straights add further value. Calling is correct despite positional disadvantage.

result.summary: s2 wins by chip lead after 30 hands (s2: 2220, s4: 1780). Biggest pot: 3910. Showdowns: 28.
